name: @dk/yoink
description: Yoink executes a retrieval plan and bundles the results into a model-ready multipart MIME bundle.

scripts.typecheck: tsc src/cli.ts --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test
scripts.build: tsc src/cli.ts --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node --outDir dist --rootDir src
scripts.prepare: npm run build && chmod +x dist/cli.js && ln -sf ../../dist/cli.js node_modules/.bin/yoink
